anran-jin.en: Anran Jin works at the interface of quantum information, secure quantum communication, and quantum many-body diagnostics. Her recent papers use information-theoretic tools in two rather different settings: practical continuous-variable and phase-matching quantum key distribution, and strange-correlator or entropy-based probes of critical lattice models. The resulting research profile is centered on how robust information can be extracted from noisy quantum systems, whether the goal is cryptographic security or the identification of hidden critical and topological structure.
anran-jin.zh: 靳安然的研究围绕量子信息、量子通信安全和量子多体系统诊断展开。她近年的工作一方面研究连续变量和相位匹配量子密钥分发中的安全性与效率问题，另一方面用 strange correlator 和熵判据来识别格点模型中的临界结构。整体来看，她关心的是如何从带有噪声或复杂关联的量子系统中提取稳定的信息，无论这些信息最终用于安全通信，还是用于刻画隐藏的拓扑和临界性质。

babak-haghighat.en: Babak Haghighat studies string theory and supersymmetric quantum field theory through the geometry and topology of compactification, defects, and conformal blocks. In recent work, KZ and irregular KZ connections, Rozansky-Witten foams, Vafa-Witten partition functions, SymTFT, and parafermionic defects appear as different manifestations of the same organizing principle: higher-dimensional supersymmetric theories can produce rich low-dimensional algebraic and topological structures. This continues his earlier work on topological strings, M-strings, and 6d SCFTs, while shifting the emphasis toward non-invertible defects, modularity, and representation-theoretic control of quantum field theory.
babak-haghighat.zh: Babak Haghighat 从紧化、缺陷和共形块的几何与拓扑结构研究弦理论和超对称量子场论。近年的 KZ 与 irregular KZ 联络、Rozansky-Witten foam、Vafa-Witten 配分函数、SymTFT 和 parafermion 缺陷，看起来分属不同问题，但共同指向一个核心主题：高维超对称理论能够生成丰富的低维代数和拓扑结构。这一方向延续了他在拓扑弦、M-string 和 6 维 SCFT 上的工作，同时把重点推进到非可逆缺陷、模性以及用表示论控制量子场论结构。

bartek-czech.en: Bartek Czech uses quantum information as a language for reconstructing geometry in holography. His recent work moves beyond individual entanglement-entropy formulas and studies the global constraints that make holographic states geometrical, including entropy cones, entropy inequalities, entanglement wedge nesting, and erasure-correction properties. This is complemented by work on modular Berry phases, symplectic forms, reflected entropy, and boundary-bulk transport, where the question is not only what geometric quantity an information measure computes, but how the space of boundary states carries bulk geometric data.
bartek-czech.zh: Bartek Czech 用量子信息语言研究全息中几何如何从边界场论中重构出来。近年的工作不只是计算某个纠缠熵公式，而是研究全息态之所以能够对应几何时必须满足的整体约束，例如全息熵锥、熵不等式、纠缠楔嵌套以及擦除纠错性质。与此相配合，他也研究模 Berry 相、辛结构、反射熵和边界到体的输运结构，重点在于理解边界态空间本身如何携带 bulk 几何信息。

benjamin-zhou.en: Benjamin Zhou works in enumerative geometry and mirror symmetry, with an emphasis on structures that are natural from string-theoretic geometry. His recent papers use quantum periods, log Calabi-Yau pairs, projective bundles, and higher-genus Gromov-Witten theory to understand how enumerative invariants are encoded in mirror-symmetric data. The central theme is to turn the geometric input of a Calabi-Yau or log Calabi-Yau problem into computable invariants, while keeping track of the structures expected from topological strings and mirror symmetry.
benjamin-zhou.zh: Benjamin Zhou 的研究位于计数几何和镜像对称交界处，特别关注弦论几何中自然出现的结构。近年的工作通过量子周期、log Calabi-Yau 对、射影丛和高亏格 Gromov-Witten 理论，研究计数不变量如何被镜像对称数据编码。其核心目标是把 Calabi-Yau 或 log Calabi-Yau 问题中的几何输入转化为可计算的不变量，同时保留拓扑弦和镜像对称预期的结构。

bin-gui.en: Bin Gui studies the mathematical foundations of two-dimensional conformal field theory, especially the relation between algebraic vertex-operator-algebra methods and analytic conformal-net methods. His recent work develops analytic conformal blocks for C2-cofinite vertex operator algebras, including propagation, sewing, factorization, and positivity properties of fusion products. A central goal is to make the passage between VOA module categories and conformal nets precise enough that unitarity, tensor-category structure, and analytic CFT constructions can be compared within one framework.
bin-gui.zh: 归斌研究二维共形场论的数学基础，重点是顶点算子代数方法与共形网方法之间的关系。近年的工作系统发展 C2-cofinite 顶点算子代数的解析共形块，包括传播性质、sewing、分解定理以及融合积的正性结构。其核心目标是把 VOA 模范畴和共形网之间的对应做得足够精确，从而在同一个框架中比较酉性、张量范畴结构和解析共形场论构造。

chi-ming-chang.en: Chi-Ming Chang studies exact structures in supersymmetric quantum field theory and quantum gravity, with a recurring focus on how microscopic field-theory data organize black-hole states and holographic spectra. His recent work develops this question through indices and cohomological methods, including BMN matrix quantum mechanics, D1-D5 and SYK systems, Q-cohomology, chiral algebras, and S-duality. Rather than treating these as separate topics, the common thread is to understand when highly constrained algebraic or topological sectors of a quantum field theory are sufficient to reveal stringy degrees of freedom, black-hole microstates, or non-invertible and defect structures that survive along renormalization-group flows.
chi-ming-chang.zh: 张其明研究超对称量子场论和量子引力中的精确结构，核心问题之一是场论中的微观数据如何组织黑洞态和全息谱。近年的工作通过指标和上同调方法推进这一问题，涉及 BMN 矩阵量子力学、D1-D5 与 SYK 系统、Q-cohomology、手征代数和 S-duality 等方向。这些主题并不是彼此独立的清单，而是共同服务于一个目标：理解量子场论中受到强约束的代数或拓扑扇区，何时足以揭示弦论自由度、黑洞微观态，以及在重整化群流中仍然保留下来的缺陷和非可逆对称性结构。

davide-bason.en: Davide Bason studies supersymmetric gauge theories in situations where boundaries, defects, and curved backgrounds make exact field-theoretic structures visible. Recent work on BCFT one-point functions and boundary conditions of four-dimensional N=2 gauge theories is complemented by studies of N=2 super Yang-Mills theory in AdS4, F_AdS-maximization, and AdS F-theorems. The broader theme is to understand how supersymmetry, boundary data, and generalized symmetries constrain quantum field theories, especially when higher-form or 2-group symmetries are gauged only on part of spacetime.
davide-bason.zh: Davide Bason 研究带有边界、缺陷或弯曲背景的超对称规范理论，在这些情形中场论的精确结构往往会变得更清楚。近年的工作从 BCFT 中 Coulomb branch 算符的一点函数和四维 N=2 规范理论的边界条件出发，进一步研究 AdS4 中的 N=2 超 Yang-Mills 理论、F_AdS-maximization 和 AdS F-theorem。整体脉络是理解超对称、边界数据和广义对称性如何约束量子场论，特别是在高形式或 2-group 对称性只在部分时空中被 gauging 的情况下。

dongsheng-ge.en: Dongsheng Ge studies how defects, boundaries, and interfaces reorganize quantum field theory and holography. His recent work treats localized RG flows, defect C-theorems, nonfactorizing interfaces, and interacting conformal line defects as tools for probing degrees of freedom that live on submanifolds rather than in the full bulk theory. In parallel, his work on holographic BCFT, Virasoro-subalgebra constructions of geometry, and brane scattering uses entanglement and boundary dynamics to connect quantum-information measures with gravitational dual descriptions.
dongsheng-ge.zh: 葛东胜研究缺陷、边界和界面如何重组量子场论与全息对偶中的自由度。近年的工作把局域 RG 流、缺陷 C-theorem、非因子化界面和相互作用共形线缺陷作为工具，用来刻画生活在子流形上的自由度，而不只是整体 bulk 场论的性质。与此同时，他关于全息 BCFT、由 Virasoro 子代数构造几何以及 brane 散射的研究，则用纠缠和边界动力学把量子信息量与引力对偶联系起来。

gabriel-arenas-henriquez.en: Gabriel Arenas-Henriquez works on black holes, holography, and gravitational thermodynamics, especially in settings where boundary conditions and acceleration modify the usual AdS/CFT picture. His recent studies of accelerating black holes in three dimensions clarify how horizons, thermodynamic phases, and holographic boundary data fit together in lower-dimensional gravity. Related work on Fefferman-Graham gauges, boundary Weyl structures, de Sitter entropy corrections, and fluid/gravity radiation explores how gravitational observables change under different asymptotic, thermodynamic, or flat-limit regimes.
gabriel-arenas-henriquez.zh: Gabriel Arenas-Henriquez 研究黑洞、全息和引力热力学，尤其关注边界条件和加速度会改变通常 AdS/CFT 图像的情形。近年关于三维加速黑洞的工作，澄清了低维引力中视界、热力学相结构和全息边界数据之间的关系。与此相关，他也研究 Fefferman-Graham 规范、边界 Weyl 结构、de Sitter 熵修正以及 fluid/gravity 中的辐射问题，用来理解引力观测量在不同渐近条件、热力学极限和平直极限下如何变化。

jack-holden.en: Jack Holden works on strongly coupled gauge theories and large-N dynamics, with an emphasis on phases that are difficult to see in perturbation theory. His recent work on partial deconfinement, confinement, Wilson loops, and random-matrix structures studies how gauge theories reorganize their degrees of freedom at finite temperature, finite density, or strong coupling. More recent projects connect these ideas to AdS/CFT with flavor and to BPS black-hole phases, where instanton condensation and holomorphic mass deformations provide concrete mechanisms for new phases.
jack-holden.zh: Jack Holden 研究强耦合规范理论和大 N 动力学，重点是那些难以用微扰方法直接看见的相结构。近年关于部分退禁闭、禁闭、Wilson loop 和随机矩阵结构的工作，关注规范理论在有限温度、有限密度或强耦合下如何重新组织自由度。更近期的工作把这些问题与带 flavor 的 AdS/CFT 以及 BPS 黑洞相联系起来，其中 instanton condensation 和全纯质量形变提供了产生新相的具体机制。

junya-yagi.en: Junya Yagi studies exact correspondences among supersymmetric quantum field theory, string/M-theory, integrable lattice models, and quantum algebra. His recent work uses the tetrahedron equation, cluster transformations, state-integral models, Teichmuller TQFT, and quantized six-vertex models to understand why three-dimensional integrable structures naturally arise from gauge and string-theoretic constructions. The guiding idea is that defect operators, branes, and compactifications can turn field-theoretic dualities into algebraic relations of integrable models, making integrability a geometric consequence rather than an isolated technique.
junya-yagi.zh: Junya Yagi 研究超对称量子场论、弦/M 理论、可积格点模型和量子代数之间的精确对应。近年的工作利用 tetrahedron equation、cluster transformation、state-integral 模型、Teichmuller TQFT 和量子化六顶点模型，解释为什么三维可积结构会自然地从规范理论和弦论构造中出现。其基本思想是：缺陷算符、brane 和紧化可以把场论对偶转化为可积模型中的代数关系，使可积性成为几何和场论结构的结果，而不是一个孤立的计算技巧。

liangyu-chen.en: Liangyu Chen studies quantum information in field theory and holography, especially how entanglement-based quantities diagnose deformed or chaotic quantum systems. His recent work on TTbar and JTbar deformed CFTs analyzes how symmetries, operators, and correlators survive or are reorganized under irrelevant deformations. Other projects on KdV ensembles, ETH, Renyi and reflected entropies, entanglement of purification, Krylov complexity, modular flow, and mutual information all address a common question: which information-theoretic observables remain sharp enough to probe nonlocal dynamics in strongly coupled or holographic field theories.
liangyu-chen.zh: 陈良玉研究场论和全息中的量子信息问题，特别关注纠缠相关量如何诊断形变场论和混沌量子系统。近年关于 TTbar 和 JTbar 形变 CFT 的工作，分析对称性、算符和关联函数在无关形变下如何保留或重组。另一方面，KdV 广义系综、ETH、Renyi 熵、反射熵、纠缠纯化、Krylov 复杂度、模流和互信息等研究，服务于同一个问题：在强耦合或全息场论中，哪些信息论观测量仍然足够敏感，可以探测非局域动力学结构。

ling-yan-hung.en: Ling-Yan Hung connects holography, tensor networks, topological order, and categorical symmetries by treating emergence of spacetime and emergence of critical lattice models as related renormalization problems. Her recent work formulates AdS3/CFT2 as a symmetry-preserving quantum RG flow and uses BCFT ensembles and tensor networks to reconstruct emergent geometry and rational CFT data. In parallel, her studies of SymTFT boundaries, anyon condensation, and competing condensation channels show how categorical symmetry data can control both topological phases and the critical theories that appear at their interfaces.
ling-yan-hung.zh: 孔令欣把全息、张量网络、拓扑序和范畴对称性联系起来，将时空涌现和临界格点模型涌现都看作重整化问题。她近年的工作把 AdS3/CFT2 描述为保持拓扑对称性的量子 RG 流，并用 BCFT 系综和张量网络重构涌现几何与理性 CFT 数据。与此同时，她关于 SymTFT 边界、任意子凝聚和相互竞争凝聚通道的研究，展示了范畴对称性数据如何同时控制拓扑相以及出现在界面上的临界理论。

mohamed-elmi.en: Mohamed Elmi studies Calabi-Yau geometry, mirror symmetry, and arithmetic structures that arise in string compactification. His recent work on periods of Calabi-Yau threefolds, Hulek-Verrill geometries, classically modular points, and Hadamard products treats period data as a bridge between algebraic geometry, BPS structures, and string-theoretic invariants. Related work on time reversal and CP invariance in Calabi-Yau compactifications shows how these geometric and arithmetic structures feed into physical questions about symmetries of compactified string theory.
mohamed-elmi.zh: Mohamed Elmi 研究 Calabi-Yau 几何、镜像对称以及弦紧化中出现的算术结构。近年关于 Calabi-Yau 三重空间周期、Hulek-Verrill 几何、classically modular points 和 Hadamard product 的工作，把周期数据作为连接代数几何、BPS 结构和弦论不变量的桥梁。与此相关，他关于 Calabi-Yau 紧化中时间反演和 CP 不变性的研究，则说明这些几何与算术结构如何进入紧化弦理论的对称性问题。

myungbo-shim.en: Myungbo Shim studies topological and algebraic structures in supersymmetric field theory and string theory, especially where three-dimensional gauge theories meet vertex algebras and integrable systems. Recent work on affine W-algebras and Miura maps from 3d N=4 quiver gauge theories develops the algebraic side of this correspondence, while work on Teichmuller TQFT, tetrahedron equations, q-opers, and open spin chains develops the integrable and topological side. The broader theme is that dualities of supersymmetric field theories can often be made concrete as relations among TQFTs, vertex algebras, and quantum-integrable models.
myungbo-shim.zh: Myungbo Shim 研究超对称场论和弦理论中的拓扑与代数结构，特别关注三维规范理论、顶点代数和可积系统相遇的地方。近年关于 3d N=4 quiver 规范理论中仿射 W-代数与 Miura 映射的工作，发展了这种对应的代数侧；而关于 Teichmuller TQFT、tetrahedron equation、q-oper 和开放 spin chain 的研究，则发展了其可积和拓扑侧。整体主题是：超对称场论的对偶往往可以具体表现为 TQFT、顶点代数和量子可积模型之间的关系。

nicolai-reshetikhin.en: Nicolai Reshetikhin's research links quantum groups, integrable systems, representation theory, and low-dimensional topology. His recent papers revisit this circle of ideas through irregular KZ equations, Kac-Moody representations, Rozansky-Witten foams, quantum integrable systems on classical integrable backgrounds, Calogero-Moser-Sutherland systems, and two-dimensional Yang-Mills theory with corners. The common thread is the construction of algebraic and geometric mechanisms that turn topological or representation-theoretic data into exactly solvable quantum systems, and conversely use integrability to illuminate topology.
nicolai-reshetikhin.zh: Nicolai Reshetikhin 的研究连接量子群、可积系统、表示论和低维拓扑。近年的论文从 irregular KZ 方程、Kac-Moody 表示、Rozansky-Witten foam、经典可积背景上的量子可积系统、Calogero-Moser-Sutherland 系统以及带 corner 的二维 Yang-Mills 理论等角度重新展开这一组思想。其共同主线是构造代数和几何机制，把拓扑或表示论数据转化为精确可解的量子系统，并反过来用可积性理解拓扑结构。

nikolaos-angelinos.en: Nikolaos Angelinos studies quantum information, conformal field theory, and holography, with a recent emphasis on the role of error-correcting codes and ensemble structures. His work on Narain CFTs, WZW models, stabilizer states, and Abelian three-dimensional TQFT gravity explores how discrete code data can organize families of conformal theories and their gravitational duals. Related projects on Krylov-space diagnostics and long-range fermion entanglement use information-theoretic tools to probe dynamics and correlations beyond conventional local observables.
nikolaos-angelinos.zh: Nikolaos Angelinos 研究量子信息、共形场论和全息，近年特别关注纠错码和系综结构的作用。他关于 Narain CFT、WZW 模型、stabilizer state 和三维 Abelian TQFT gravity 的工作，探索离散编码数据如何组织一族共形场论及其引力对偶。与此相关，Krylov 空间诊断和长程费米系统纠缠的研究，则用信息论工具探测常规局域观测量之外的动力学与关联结构。

ning-su.en: Ning Su develops numerical and analytic bootstrap methods for strongly coupled quantum field theories. His recent work combines high-precision studies of the 3d Ising and N=1 super-Ising models with algorithmic advances such as navigator and hybrid bootstrap methods, extending bootstrap technology beyond isolated benchmark models. Applications to non-Abelian currents, deconfined quantum tricriticality, Potts and cubic CFTs, O(3)-to-cubic flows, and large-charge sectors all reflect the same goal: to make nonperturbative constraints sharp enough to map the landscape of strongly coupled critical theories.
ning-su.zh: 苏宁发展用于强耦合量子场论的数值和解析 bootstrap 方法。近年的工作一方面对三维 Ising 和 N=1 super-Ising 模型进行高精度研究，另一方面发展 navigator 和 hybrid bootstrap 等算法，使 bootstrap 技术不只适用于少数标准模型。非阿贝尔流、deconfined quantum tricriticality、Potts 与 cubic CFT、O(3) 到 cubic 的流以及大荷数扇区等应用，体现了同一个目标：把非微扰约束做得足够精确，从而描绘强耦合临界理论的空间。

pengxiang-hao.en: Pengxiang Hao studies three-dimensional flat-space, Carrollian, Galilean, and BMS holography, where the usual relativistic conformal symmetry is replaced by non-Lorentzian symmetry algebras. His recent work develops bulk reconstruction in Flat3/CCFT2 and relates it to flat limits of (A)dS3/CFT2, while parallel projects analyze BMS-invariant free fields, modular Hamiltonians, entanglement entropy, and Carrollian-Galilean conformal blocks. Work on AdS/BCFT, de Sitter islands, and glue-on AdS for TTbar-deformed CFTs further connects these nonstandard holographic limits to entanglement and boundary-gravity constructions.
pengxiang-hao.zh: 郝鹏翔研究三维平直时空、Carrollian、Galilean 和 BMS 全息，在这些理论中通常的相对论共形对称性被非洛伦兹对称代数取代。近年的工作发展 Flat3/CCFT2 中的体重构，并把它与 (A)dS3/CFT2 的平直极限联系起来；同时，他也研究 BMS 不变自由场、模哈密顿量、纠缠熵和 Carrollian-Galilean 共形块。关于 AdS/BCFT、de Sitter island 以及 TTbar 形变 CFT 的 glue-on AdS 构造，则进一步把这些非标准全息极限同纠缠和边界引力联系起来。

qiaoyin-pan.en: Qiaoyin Pan studies loop quantum gravity, spinfoam models, quantum groups, and topological field theory, with a focus on how discrete quantum-geometric data encode curved spacetime. Her recent work on quantum curved tetrahedra and quantum-group intertwiner spaces develops the local building blocks of spinfoam geometry, while work on critical points, Hessians, and complex Chern-Simons theory analyzes the semiclassical behavior of spinfoam amplitudes with a cosmological constant. Related studies of generalized Minkowski theorems, holomorphic blocks, and SU_q(2) lattice gauge observables connect this discrete approach to three-dimensional gravity and quantum topology.
qiaoyin-pan.zh: 潘俏尹研究圈量子引力、spinfoam 模型、量子群和拓扑场论，重点是离散量子几何数据如何编码弯曲时空。她近年关于量子弯曲四面体和量子群 intertwiner 空间的工作，发展了 spinfoam 几何的局域构件；而关于临界点、Hessian 和复 Chern-Simons 理论的研究，则分析带宇宙学常数的 spinfoam 振幅在半经典极限下的行为。广义 Minkowski 定理、holomorphic block 和 SU_q(2) 格点规范理论观测量等工作，把这种离散方法与三维引力和量子拓扑联系起来。

qingrui-wang.en: Qingrui Wang studies topological phases of matter through field-theoretic, lattice, and categorical descriptions. His recent work extends earlier classifications of interacting fermionic symmetry-protected phases toward interfaces, anomalous boundaries, stacking structures, and continuum TQFT descriptions of non-Abelian topological order. The emphasis is on matching microscopic constructions with effective topological field theories, so that phenomena such as embedded Majorana islands, non-invertible symmetries, and mixed anomalies can be understood as different aspects of the same underlying topological data.
qingrui-wang.zh: 王晴睿通过场论、格点模型和范畴语言研究拓扑物态。近年的工作把相互作用费米对称保护拓扑相的分类推进到界面、反常边界、stacking 结构以及三维非阿贝尔拓扑序的连续 TQFT 描述。其重点不是单纯列出相的分类，而是把微观构造与有效拓扑场论相匹配，从而把嵌入式 Majorana island、非可逆对称性和混合反常理解为同一组底层拓扑数据的不同表现。

robert-mcrae.en: Robert McRae studies vertex operator algebras and tensor-category structures in logarithmic and rational conformal field theory. His recent work builds tensor and ribbon categories for Virasoro, affine sl2, singlet, triplet, and W-(super)algebra representation categories, while also developing Deligne tensor products and rationality criteria for VOA module categories. The broader goal is to understand when representation categories of conformal field theories carry enough rigidity and braided structure to support modular, logarithmic, and orbifold constructions.
robert-mcrae.zh: Robert McRae 研究对数和有理共形场论中的顶点算子代数及其张量范畴结构。近年的工作为 Virasoro、仿射 sl2、singlet、triplet 和 W-(super)algebra 的表示范畴构造张量与 ribbon 结构，同时发展 VOA 模范畴的 Deligne 张量积和有理性判据。其更大的目标是理解共形场论的表示范畴何时具有足够的刚性和编织结构，从而支持模性、对数 CFT 和 orbifold 构造。

rongge-xu.en: Rongge Xu works on topological phases, categorical algebra, and quantum many-body systems. His recent representative work uses categorical descriptions of one-dimensional gapped phases with Abelian onsite symmetries and 2-Morita equivalence of condensable algebras to compare different algebraic presentations of the same topological data. This perspective is useful for understanding how boundary theories, condensation processes, and topological orders are related, especially when ordinary symmetry labels are not fine enough to distinguish phases.
rongge-xu.zh: 许容阁研究拓扑物态、范畴代数和量子多体系统。其近年代表性工作用范畴语言描述带阿贝尔 onsite 对称性的一维 gapped phases，并通过 condensable algebra 的 2-Morita 等价比较同一拓扑数据的不同代数表示。这种观点有助于理解边界理论、凝聚过程和拓扑序之间的关系，特别是在普通对称性标签不足以区分不同相的情况下。

sarthak-duary.en: Sarthak Duary studies flat-space holography, celestial amplitudes, string theory, and soft theorems, focusing on how gravitational scattering data can be reorganized into field-theoretic or worldsheet language. His recent work derives flat limits of AdS/CFT from AdS geodesics and develops celestial or Klein-space spectral representations, while related papers analyze soft scalar and photon theorems together with memory effects. Work on tensionless and tensile open strings in Kalb-Ramond backgrounds and on noncommutativity from covariant phase space connects the same flat-space questions to string-theoretic degrees of freedom.
sarthak-duary.zh: Sarthak Duary 研究平直时空全息、celestial amplitude、弦理论和 soft theorem，重点是引力散射数据如何被重新组织成场论或世界面语言。近年的工作从 AdS 测地线推导 AdS/CFT 的平直极限，并发展 celestial 与 Klein 空间的谱表示；相关论文则把 soft scalar 和 photon theorem 与记忆效应结合起来研究。关于 Kalb-Ramond 背景中 tensionless 与 tensile open string、以及由协变相空间得到非对易性的工作，又把这些平直时空问题同弦论自由度联系起来。

si-li.en: Si Li works on mathematical quantum field theory, geometric quantization, and algebraic structures in string theory. His recent work develops chiral-algebraic and homological tools such as quadratic duality, Hochschild homology, contact-term algebras, and Dijkgraaf's master equation, while also studying Chern-Simons matrix models and their large-N limits. Together with work on Picard-Lefschetz theory, alien calculus, and topological quantum mechanics on orbifolds, this program aims to make perturbative and nonperturbative structures of quantum field theory precise in geometric and algebraic terms.
si-li.zh: 李思研究数学量子场论、几何量子化以及弦理论中的代数结构。近年的工作发展手征代数和同调代数工具，例如二次对偶、Hochschild 同调、contact term algebra 和 Dijkgraaf master equation，同时研究 Chern-Simons 矩阵模型及其大 N 极限。结合 Picard-Lefschetz 理论、alien calculus 和 orbifold 上的拓扑量子力学，这一研究纲领的目标是用几何和代数语言精确描述量子场论的微扰与非微扰结构。

sinong-liu.en: Sinong Liu studies quantum information, nonequilibrium field theory, and quantum gravity, with a recent emphasis on complexity as a diagnostic of dynamics. His work on Krylov and density-matrix complexity, spread complexity, PXP scars, and topological transitions in the Kitaev chain explores how operator growth and state spreading capture features that are not visible in ordinary correlation functions. Related studies of lowest-Landau-level and half-BPS sectors, quantum quench, and Liouville walls in two-dimensional string theory connect these information-theoretic tools to emergent spacetime and singularity dynamics.
sinong-liu.zh: 刘思浓研究量子信息、非平衡场论和量子引力，近年特别关注复杂度作为动力学诊断工具的作用。关于 Krylov 与密度矩阵复杂度、spread complexity、PXP scar 以及 Kitaev 链拓扑相变的工作，探索算符增长和态扩散如何捕捉普通关联函数不容易看见的结构。最低 Landau 能级和 half-BPS 扇区、量子 quench 以及二维弦理论中 Liouville wall 的研究，则把这些信息论工具同涌现时空和奇点动力学联系起来。

takumi-otani.en: Takumi Otani studies stability conditions, exceptional collections, Frobenius manifolds, and mirror symmetry. His recent and representative work on Dynkin and extended Dynkin quivers, orbifold projective lines, Kronecker quivers, and Gamma integral structures for invertible polynomials focuses on how categorical and enumerative data control mirror-symmetric geometry. The larger theme is to understand derived categories not only as algebraic objects, but as spaces whose stability, mutation, and Frobenius structures reflect the geometry expected from mirror symmetry.
takumi-otani.zh: Takumi Otani 研究稳定条件、exceptional collection、Frobenius 流形和镜像对称。其近期和代表性工作围绕 Dynkin 与 extended Dynkin quiver、orbifold projective line、Kronecker quiver 以及 invertible polynomial 的 Gamma integral structure 展开，关注范畴和计数数据如何控制镜像对称中的几何结构。更大的主题是把导出范畴不只看成代数对象，而是看成具有稳定性、变换和 Frobenius 结构的空间，这些结构反映了镜像对称预期的几何。

wei-song.en: Wei Song studies three-dimensional quantum gravity, holography, and two-dimensional field theories with non-Lorentzian or irrelevant-deformation structures. Her recent work develops BMS, Carrollian, and Galilean symmetric field theories as alternatives to ordinary relativistic CFTs, and uses modular Hamiltonians, entanglement entropy, and correlation functions to probe their dynamics. In parallel, her work on asymptotic symmetries from the string worldsheet, TsT/TTbar holography, JTbar and TTbar deformations, and glue-on AdS constructions connects nonstandard boundary conditions and irrelevant deformations to black-hole physics and holographic geometry.
wei-song.zh: 宋伟研究三维量子引力、全息以及具有非洛伦兹或无关形变结构的二维场论。近年的工作把 BMS、Carrollian 和 Galilean 对称场论发展为普通相对论 CFT 之外的全息边界理论，并用模哈密顿量、纠缠熵和关联函数探测这些理论的动力学。与此同时，她关于弦世界面渐近对称性、TsT/TTbar 全息、JTbar 与 TTbar 形变以及 glue-on AdS 构造的研究，把非标准边界条件和无关形变同黑洞物理及全息几何联系起来。

wenbin-yan.en: Wenbin Yan studies exact structures of four-dimensional N=2 superconformal field theories and the lower-dimensional algebraic systems that encode them. His recent work relates Higgs branches, Coulomb branches, vertex operator algebras, Wilson lines, mixed Hodge structures, W-algebra characters, and affine Springer fibers, with mirror symmetry for circle-compactified class-S theories providing a recurring bridge between physics and geometry. The aim is to turn protected sectors of supersymmetric field theories into computable algebraic objects, so that dualities, indices, and moduli-space geometry can be compared precisely.
wenbin-yan.zh: 颜文斌研究四维 N=2 超共形场论的精确结构，以及编码这些结构的低维代数系统。近年的工作把 Higgs branch、Coulomb branch、顶点算子代数、Wilson line、mixed Hodge structure、W-代数 character 和 affine Springer fiber 联系起来，其中圆紧化 class-S 理论的镜像对称反复充当物理与几何之间的桥梁。其目标是把超对称场论的受保护扇区转化为可计算的代数对象，从而精确比较对偶、指标和模空间几何。

youssra-boujakhrout.en: Youssra Boujakhrout studies integrable structures in gauge theory and string theory, together with topological and higher-spin gravity. Her recent work on four-dimensional Chern-Simons theory shows how Lax operators, superspin chains, exceptional and ADE-type 't Hooft lines, and topological quivers arise from a common gauge-theoretic origin. Later work on higher-spin AdS3 gravity, Tits-Satake diagrams, topological 4d gravity, gravitational defects, and finite topological-gravity landscapes extends this perspective from integrable models to the classification of gravitational and topological sectors.
youssra-boujakhrout.zh: Youssra Boujakhrout 研究规范理论和弦理论中的可积结构，并将其与拓扑引力和高自旋引力联系起来。近年关于四维 Chern-Simons 理论的工作说明，Lax 算符、superspin chain、exceptional 与 ADE 型 't Hooft line 以及 topological quiver 可以从共同的规范理论来源中产生。随后关于高自旋 AdS3 引力、Tits-Satake 图、四维拓扑引力、引力缺陷和有限拓扑引力 landscape 的研究，则把这种观点从可积模型推广到引力和拓扑扇区的分类问题。

yuze-ruan.en: Yuze Ruan works on quantum algebra, subfactor theory, and tensor categories related to topological quantum field theory. His recent representative work studies metaplectic categories, Witt classes of so(2r) theories, permutation gauging, Hecke-group representations from TQFT, and low-dimensional braid-group representations. These problems are tied together by the question of how algebraic data of modular tensor categories encode topological phases, braid statistics, and operations such as gauging or passage to Witt equivalence classes.
yuze-ruan.zh: 阮钰泽研究与拓扑量子场论相关的量子代数、子因子理论和张量范畴。其近年代表性工作包括 metaplectic category、so(2r) 理论的 Witt 类、permutation gauging、来自 TQFT 的 Hecke 群表示，以及 braid group 的低维表示。这些问题的共同核心是：模张量范畴的代数数据如何编码拓扑相、编织统计，以及 gauging 或取 Witt 等价类等操作。

zhenbin-yang.en: Zhenbin Yang works on quantum gravity, black-hole information, and AdS/CFT, especially where wormholes and ensemble effects reshape semiclassical intuition. His recent work on traversable-wormhole channel capacity, de Sitter density of states, de Sitter double cones, SYK fortuity, and spacetime generalizations of mutual information studies how information-theoretic quantities behave in genuinely gravitational Hilbert spaces. Earlier and continuing work on genus expansions, spectral plateaus, firewalls from wormholes, Holevo information, and subleading Weingarten effects develops the same theme from the viewpoint of replica wormholes and ensemble gravity.
zhenbin-yang.zh: Zhenbin Yang 研究量子引力、黑洞信息问题和 AdS/CFT，特别关注虫洞和系综效应如何改变半经典图像。近年关于可穿越虫洞量子信道容量、de Sitter 态密度、de Sitter double cone、SYK fortuity 和互信息时空推广的工作，研究信息论量在真正引力 Hilbert 空间中的行为。关于 genus 展开、谱 plateau、由虫洞产生的 firewall、Holevo 信息和次领头 Weingarten 效应的工作，则从 replica wormhole 和系综引力角度继续推进同一主题。
